records.m_Talk_ENG: What's with this speed? It's different from earlier!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's with this speed? It's different from earlier!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's with this speed? It's different from earlier!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Keehee. Why so slow? You're the same as before!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Keehee. Why so slow? You're the same as before!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Keehee. Why so slow? You're the same as before!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Major, don't let yourself be provoked.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Major, don't let yourself be provoked.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Major, don't let yourself be provoked.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I got you from behind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I got you from behind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I got you from behind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seo Yoon? Since when were you there?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seo Yoon? Since when were you there?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seo Yoon? Since when were you there?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was hiding and waiting for the right moment, trusting you, officer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was hiding and waiting for the right moment, trusting you, officer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was hiding and waiting for the right moment, trusting you, officer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You mean you used me as bait!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You mean you used me as bait!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You mean you used me as bait!

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right! Let's finish this before she escapes!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right! Let's finish this before she escapes!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right! Let's finish this before she escapes!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lieutenant, that thing we brought. Pour it on her! Drench her!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lieutenant, that thing we brought. Pour it on her! Drench her!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lieutenant, that thing we brought. Pour it on her! Drench her!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa...! *Cough* What is this? It stinks!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa...! *Cough* What is this? It stinks!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa...! *Cough* What is this? It stinks!

records.m_Talk_ENG: She turned into liquid and shriveled up, for sure. Her activity has definitely stopped.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She turned into liquid and shriveled up, for sure. Her activity has definitely stopped.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She turned into liquid and shriveled up, for sure. Her activity has definitely stopped.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You almost ruined it, but at least we handled it before she could drain your strength. Glad it worked out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You almost ruined it, but at least we handled it before she could drain your strength. Glad it worked out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You almost ruined it, but at least we handled it before she could drain your strength. Glad it worked out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right, let's not dwell on it. It's all in the past now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right, let's not dwell on it. It's all in the past now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right, let's not dwell on it. It's all in the past now.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Perfect timing. I was just about to
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Perfect timing. I was just about to
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Perfect timing. I was just about to
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey...! I've run a few tests with the virus sample collected from the meteorite site.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey...! I've run a few tests with the virus sample collected from the meteorite site.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey...! I've run a few tests with the virus sample collected from the meteorite site.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To summarize, she's immune to fire!
records.m_Talk_DEU: To summarize, she's immune to fire!
records.m_Talk_FRA: To summarize, she's immune to fire!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It looked like the sample died for a moment, but after five hours, it actually divided and started multiplying!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It looked like the sample died for a moment, but after five hours, it actually divided and started multiplying!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It looked like the sample died for a moment, but after five hours, it actually divided and started multiplying!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If a small part can recover that quickly, the entire colony will recover much faster!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If a small part can recover that quickly, the entire colony will recover much faster!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If a small part can recover that quickly, the entire colony will recover much faster!
